metadata.description: Liquity V2 is a multi-collateral borrowing protocol that lets users deposit WETH, wstETH, or rETH as collateral to mint BOLD, a USD-pegged stablecoin. All 44 contracts are immutable with no admin keys, timelocks, or governance — every permissioned function is restricted to internal contract-to-contract calls, making the protocol fully autonomous once deployed. The system relies on three Chainlink price feeds for collateral valuation and on Lido's wstETH and RocketPool's rETH exchange rate contracts for LST pricing, with $105.81M in total capital across its collateral pools.

admins.name: BorrowerOperations (wstETH branch)
admins.description: Internal protocol contract that gates user-facing operations for the wstETH collateral branch. Controls 37 permissioned functions across 24 contracts including collateral transfers in ActivePool, interest minting, trove management in SortedTroves, and branch shutdown. This is not a human admin — it enforces protocol logic for opening, adjusting, and closing troves.

admins.name: TroveManager (wstETH branch)
admins.description: Internal protocol contract that manages trove lifecycle for the wstETH branch. Controls 24 permissioned functions across 10 contracts including collateral redistribution to DefaultPool, batch management fee minting, branch shutdown flag, and StabilityPool offset (liquidation debt cancellation). All calls are protocol-internal with no external admin.

admins.name: StabilityPool (wstETH branch)
admins.description: Internal protocol contract that manages the wstETH Stability Pool. Controls 6 permissioned functions across 7 contracts, primarily collateral transfers from ActivePool and interest minting. Acts as a caller for ActivePool.sendColl and ActivePool.mintAggInterest during liquidation processing.

admins.name: DefaultPool (rETH branch)
admins.description: Internal protocol contract that holds redistributed collateral for the rETH branch. Controls 6 permissioned functions across 3 contracts, primarily receiving collateral from ActivePool during redistributions and sending it back. All calls are protocol-internal.

admins.name: ActivePool (rETH branch)
admins.description: Internal protocol contract that holds rETH collateral. Controls 5 permissioned functions across 5 contracts, gating collateral receipt from DefaultPool and BorrowerOperations. Holds (N/A) in rETH collateral.

admins.name: BorrowerOperations (rETH branch)
admins.description: Internal protocol contract that gates user-facing operations for the rETH collateral branch. Controls 18 permissioned functions across 6 contracts, mirroring the wstETH BorrowerOperations for rETH-collateralized troves. No capital directly at risk in this branch's pools as measured.

admins.name: TroveManager (rETH branch)
admins.description: Internal protocol contract that manages trove lifecycle for the rETH branch. Controls 8 permissioned functions across 8 contracts including collateral redistribution, shutdown flags, and StabilityPool offsets.

dependencies.name: Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
dependencies.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy providing the ETH/USD price. Used by all three collateral branches via their respective PriceFeed contracts — impacts 30 functions including openTrove, adjustTroveInterestRate, shutdown, and liquidation operations across BorrowerOperations and TroveManager contracts. Owned by a Chainlink 4/9 multisig.

dependencies.name: Chainlink stETH/USD Price Feed
dependencies.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy providing the stETH/USD price, used by the WSTETHPriceFeed contract to value wstETH collateral. Impacts 10 functions in the wstETH BorrowerOperations branch.

dependencies.name: Lido wstETH Token
dependencies.description: Lido's wrapped staked ETH token contract, used by the WSTETHPriceFeed for the wstETH/stETH exchange rate via stEthPerToken(). Impacts 10 functions in the wstETH collateral branch. The largest collateral pool holds (N/A) in wstETH.

dependencies.name: Chainlink rETH/ETH Price Feed
dependencies.description: Chainlink EACAggregatorProxy providing the rETH/ETH exchange rate, used by the RETHPriceFeed contract to value rETH collateral. Impacts 9 functions in the rETH BorrowerOperations branch.

dependencies.name: RocketPool rETH Token
dependencies.description: RocketPool's liquid staking token contract, used by the RETHPriceFeed for the rETH/ETH exchange rate via getExchangeRate(). Impacts 9 functions in the rETH collateral branch.

funds.name: ActivePool (wstETH)
funds.description: Main collateral pool for the wstETH branch, holding (N/A) in wstETH deposited by borrowers. The largest single pool in the protocol.

funds.name: ActivePool (rETH)
funds.description: Main collateral pool for the rETH branch, holding (N/A) in rETH deposited by borrowers.

funds.name: ActivePool (WETH)
funds.description: Main collateral pool for the WETH branch, holding (N/A) in wrapped Ether deposited by borrowers.

funds.name: StabilityPool (wstETH)
funds.description: Stability pool for the wstETH branch, holding (N/A) in BOLD deposits and wstETH liquidation gains from borrowers.

funds.name: StabilityPool (WETH)
funds.description: Stability pool for the WETH branch, holding (N/A) in BOLD deposits and WETH liquidation gains.

funds.name: StabilityPool (rETH)
funds.description: Stability pool for the rETH branch, holding (N/A) in BOLD deposits and rETH liquidation gains.

funds.name: BOLD Stablecoin
funds.description: The protocol's native stablecoin token contract with a market cap of (N/A). Ownership was renounced to the zero address after initialization — setBranchAddresses and setCollateralRegistry can no longer be called.
